label: Gen step orbital platform
description: Generates an orbital platform layout with optional faction pawns, cannons, and exterior prefabs.

factionDef.label: Faction def
factionDef.description: FactionDef whose faction controls this orbital platform.

layoutDef.label: Layout def
layoutDef.description: LayoutDef used to generate the main platform structure.

useSiteFaction.label: Use site faction
useSiteFaction.description: When true, uses the site's parent faction instead of factionDef.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Override temperature for the orbital platform map in Celsius. Absent defaults to -75.

spawnSentryDrones.label: Spawn sentry drones
spawnSentryDrones.description: When true, sentry drones are spawned based on the platform's threat points.

cannonDef.label: Cannon def
cannonDef.description: ThingDef of the cannon buildings placed at the platform corners.

platformTerrain.label: Platform terrain
platformTerrain.description: TerrainDef used for the platform surface and connecting catwalks.

orbitalDebrisDef.label: Orbital debris def
orbitalDebrisDef.description: OrbitalDebrisDef assigned to the map for orbital debris rendering.

fogOfWarColor.label: Fog of war color
fogOfWarColor.description: ColorInt used as the map's fog-of-war color. Serialized as (r, g, b).

exteriorPrefabs.label: Exterior prefabs
exteriorPrefabs.description: List of prefabs with count ranges to spawn on the platform exterior.
